Guideline: Neutral/Imperative. No explicit subject pronoun in most UI strings. Vosotros form must NOT be used (es-ES Castilian). Usted appears only in explicitly formal full sentences.
Professional, action-oriented, and neutral. Avoids editorializing on pay gap findings.
Use gender-neutral constructions where natural. Avoid defaulting to masculine plural. Do not apply '@' or 'e' inclusive forms unless explicitly requested.
Sentence case throughout. Spanish does not capitalize after a colon unless a new independent clause follows. Never use title case.
Spanish guillemets without spaces: «example». Do not use straight double quotes.
Opening question/exclamation marks required: ¿...? ¡...! Standard Spanish punctuation otherwise. Percent: 15% (no space).
{variable} placeholders preserved unchanged. Decimal separator: comma (,). Thousands: period (.). Date: DD/MM/YYYY.
Noun-adjective order: Brecha salarial, Equidad retributiva, Grupo de comparación. Spanish tends toward longer phrase structures.
Kept in English: PayAnalytics, KPI, p-value, API, CSV, feedback. Benchmark: use 'estudio comparativo' or 'referencia' in flowing text; 'benchmark' acceptable in short UI labels.
Verb first in imperative: Añadir filtro, Exportar lista, Comparar. Subject pronoun omitted.
Actions: Añadir [noun], Eliminar [noun], Exportar [noun]. Confirmations: ¿Está seguro/a de que desea...? Success: ...correctamente guardado/a.

Pay gap=Brecha salarial; Adjusted pay gap=Brecha salarial ajustada; Unadjusted pay gap=Brecha salarial no ajustada; Gender pay gap=Brecha salarial de género; Pay band=Banda salarial; Salary range=Rango salarial; Compensation=Remuneración; Raise=Aumento; Benchmark=Estudio comparativo; Pay equity=Igualdad salarial; Equal pay=Igualdad salarial; Job evaluation=Valoración de puestos de trabajo; Workforce analytics=Análisis del personal; Headcount=Número de empleados; Dataset=Conjunto de datos; Comparison group=Grupo de comparación; Employee group=Grupo de empleados; Maternity leave=Baja por maternidad; Bonus=Bonificación; Compa-ratio=Compa-ratio (kept)
+29% average length vs. English. Avoid redundant constructions; prefer concise forms.
